name: generate-punditry
description: GCP Cloud Function — generates daily AI punditry snippets via Claude API and inserts into Supabase

scripts.deploy: npm run build && gcloud functions deploy generate-punditry --gen2 --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --no-allow-unauthenticated --entry-point generatePunditry --region europe-west2 --timeout 300s --memory 256MB --set-secrets SUPABASE_URL=SUPABASE_URL:latest,SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY:latest,ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:latest --set-env-vars TOURNAMENT_SLUG=world-cup-2026
